cells.rationale: Concurrency single-refresh-owner correctness plus a gated seam that is an explicit attack surface against a real credential store is a nameable security/correctness invariant gating opus at contract-shaped effort.

An attestation that must make fabricated reports fail structurally, plus the subtle deliberate-vs-interrupting abort distinction and window-deadline orchestration, is a subtle correctness invariant warranting opus at high-blast-radius effort.
A bounded, well-specified single-surface linter gate with real but contained graph-walk reasoning and type-only/dynamic-import edge cases fits gpt-5.4-mini above spark's ceiling.
User-facing doc rewrite requiring delicate house-idiom matching (prune-not-append, forward-facing) and careful genuineness-vocabulary phrasing is judgment-heavy wording work that routes to sonnet.
